title: Dracula Theme
description: A clean, dark GUI overhaul for Minecraft in all resolutions.
body:
![https://github.com/dracula/minecraft/blob/master/images/banner.png?raw=true](https://github.com/dracula/minecraft/blob/master/images/banner.png?raw=true)

### *Beta notice*
This resourcepack isn't complete yet, and some elements will likely be broken or inconsistent. Feedback is greatly appreciated, so feel free to open an issue on Github!

## GUI Scale Matters!
The default download is meant for scale 4, but if you use a different size make sure to click on the latest release for your desired Minecraft version and download the size you play with for extra crisp textures! 

## About
Looking for a dark GUI that's easy on the eyes, but want something different from vanilla? This is the pack for you!

**Dracula Theme** is a completely custom look and feel for Minecraft's UI based on the [Dracula color palette](https://draculatheme.com/contribute). It gives the game a modern, clean look while still being fun to look at.

- *Simplified, rounded UI elements*
- *Custom, slightly softer sound for buttons*
- *Fonts and icons re-made to look sharp and geometric*
- *Supports all translations in the game*
- *Supports mods (work in progress)*
- *Looks great in vanilla, or right alongside your favorite resourcepack!*

![https://github.com/dracula/minecraft/blob/master/images/hud.png?raw=true](https://github.com/dracula/minecraft/blob/master/images/hud.png?raw=true)
![https://github.com/dracula/minecraft/blob/master/images/display.png?raw=true](https://github.com/dracula/minecraft/blob/master/images/display.png?raw=true)


## Resources

Want to submit feedback or report an issue with the pack? Open up an issue on the [Github Repo](https://github.com/dracula/minecraft/issues) or join my [Discord!](https://discord.gg/3gtNAQgv2G)

Also check out [this pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dracula-click-sound) for a standalone version of the button SFX.

Like this theme? Check out the [official Dracula website](https://draculatheme.com/) to find themes for all your favorite programs!
